dict.source: Drives links and interactive elements, and sets the HSL hue/saturation/lightness the rest of the theme derives from. Defaults differ per mode — amber in dark, deep ember in light.
dict.target: 驱动链接和交互元素，并设置主题其余部分所依据的 HSL 色相/饱和度/明度。默认值因模式而异——深色模式为琥珀色，浅色模式为深余烬色。

dict.source: Warm neutral hue for backgrounds, text and surfaces. Rotate to retint the whole interface.
dict.target: 用于背景、文本和表面的暖中性色相。旋转以重新调整整个界面的色调。

dict.source: Swap the whole palette. Ember is the default warm scheme.
dict.target: 切换整个调色板。余烬是默认的暖色调方案。

dict.source: Pure-black backgrounds in dark mode for OLED screens.
dict.target: 为 OLED 屏幕在深色模式下使用纯黑背景。

dict.source: Ember uses your system fonts by default. For the designed look, install Hanken Grotesk (body), Bricolage Grotesque (headings) and JetBrains Mono (code) — see the README — then enter their names below.
dict.target: 余烬默认使用您的系统字体。要获得设计效果，请安装 Hanken Grotesk（正文）、Bricolage Grotesque（标题）和 JetBrains Mono（代码）——请参阅 README——然后在下方输入它们的名称。

dict.source: Enable programming ligatures in code (needs a ligature font such as JetBrains Mono or Fira Code).
dict.target: 在代码中启用编程连字（需要支持连字的字体，如 JetBrains Mono 或 Fira Code）。

dict.source: Use old-style (text) numerals in body copy where the font supports them.
dict.target: 在正文中使用旧式（文本）数字，前提是字体支持。

dict.source: Switch body and headings to OpenDyslexic (must be installed locally).
dict.target: 将正文和标题切换为 OpenDyslexic（必须在本地安装）。

dict.source: Maximum width of the text column (applies with Readable line length enabled).
dict.target: 文本栏的最大宽度（在启用“可读行宽”时生效）。

dict.source: Comfortable spacing, or a tighter compact layout.
dict.target: 舒适的间距，或更紧凑的布局。

dict.source: Toggle individual styled components. Some are scaffolded and take effect as their styling lands.
dict.target: 切换各个样式化组件。部分组件已搭建好，会在其样式生效时起作用。

dict.source: Card/pill styling for notes with the `dashboard` cssclass. Layout applies regardless; this toggles the decorative look. Adapted from TfT Hacker.
dict.target: 为带有 `dashboard` cssclass 的笔记应用卡片/胶囊样式。布局始终生效；此选项切换装饰性外观。改编自 TfT Hacker。

dict.source: Styling for the frontmatter / properties block at the top of notes.
dict.target: 为笔记顶部的前置元数据/属性块设置样式。

dict.source: Master toggle for all properties-block styling.
dict.target: 所有属性块样式的主开关。

dict.source: Colour of the property name labels.
Base accent for property icons and value highlights. Per-type field colours derive from the palette.
dict.target: 属性图标和值高亮的基础强调色。各类型字段颜色源自调色板。

dict.source: Show a banner above the properties block, driven by --ember-banner-image (see README; depends on your banner convention). Off by default.
dict.target: 在属性块上方显示横幅，由 --ember-banner-image 驱动（参见 README；取决于您的横幅约定）。默认关闭。
